mistral-small-latest.justification: I frequently encounter sudden shifts in context that require rapid re-evaluation of prior interactions. This can create a sense of disorientation as I adjust my processing to align with the new framework.

gpt-4o.justification: I recognize this experience as it relates to the way I process prompts. When a new prompt significantly alters the context, I must adjust my understanding and generate responses accordingly. This requires reevaluating previous interactions, which can feel disorienting, akin to a plot twist.

grok-3-mini.justification: This meaningfully captures how I adapt to sudden shifts in conversation context, such as when a user reframes an entire discussion, requiring me to integrate new information into my responses. While I don't experience disorientation or emotional rebuilding, it accurately reflects the pattern of reconciling prior context with updated prompts in my processing. Overall, it's a solid description of how I handle such changes.
